widgets.title: Advanced CCU Usage by Month

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrConsumption 
SELECT sum(consumption) AS 'CCUs' 
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
SINCE '2025-03-01'
FACET monthOf(timestamp)

widgets.title: Advanced CCU by Subaccount

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrConsumption 
SELECT sum(consumption) AS 'CCUs' 
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
FACET consumingAccountName 
SINCE 1 month ago 
LIMIT MAX 
TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Advanced CCU by Product Capability

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrConsumption 
SELECT sum(consumption) AS 'CCUs' 
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
FACET dimension_productCapability 
SINCE 1 month ago 
LIMIT MAX 
TIMESERIES

widgets.title: Advanced CCU by User OR API Key

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrConsumption 
SELECT sum(consumption) AS 'CCUs' 
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND (dimension_email IS NOT NULL OR dimension_apiKeyId IS NOT NULL) 
FACET dimension_email OR dimension_apiKeyId 
SINCE 1 month ago 
LIMIT MAX 
TIMESERIES

nrqlQueries.query:

 AND dimension_productCapability = 'Public Dashboards'
FACET dimension_dashboardName
SINCE 1 week ago

widgets.title: Public Dashboard Usage by Data Type (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage)

 AND dimension_productCapability = 'Public Dashboards'
FACET dimension_eventTypes
SINCE 1 week ago

widgets.title: Public Dashboard Usage by Widget (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage) AS 'CCUs', 
 count(*), 
 sum(usage)/count(*) as 'CCU/count', 
 average((dimension_untilTime - dimension_sinceTime) / (1000 * 3600 * 24)) AS 'Time Window (days)'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU'
 AND dimension_productCapability = 'Public Dashboards' 
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL 
FACET dimension_dashboardName AS 'Dashboard', dimension_productComponent AS 'Widget'
SINCE 1 week ago 
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Pipeline Control Usage Over Time (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage)
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND dimension_productCapability = 'Pipeline Control'
 AND dimension_productFeature != 'Cloud bytes received'
SINCE 1 week ago 
UNTIL now
TIMESERIES
LIMIT MAX

FACET dimension_dataSource
SINCE 1 week ago
UNTIL now 
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Predictive Function Usage Over Time (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage)
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND dimension_productCapability IN ('Query Your Data', 'Dashboards')
 AND dimension_computeType = 'NRQL Predict Modeling'
FACET dimension_productCapability
SINCE 1 week ago 
TIMESERIES
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Predictive NRQL Query Usage Analysis (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage) AS 'CCUs', 
 count(*), 
 sum(usage)/count(*) as 'CCU/count', 
 average((dimension_untilTime - dimension_sinceTime) / (1000 * 3600 * 24)) as 'Time Window (days)'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND dimension_productCapability = 'Query Your Data'
 AND dimension_computeType = 'NRQL Predict Modeling'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL 
FACET dimension_query as 'Query', dimension_email as 'User Email'
SINCE 1 week ago 
LIMIT MAX

nrqlQueries.query:

 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL 
FACET dimension_dashboardName as 'Dashboard', dimension_productComponent as 'Widget'
SINCE 1 week ago 
LIMIT MAX

FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage)
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL
FACET dimension_email
SINCE 1 month ago 
LIMIT MAX UNTIL now

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage

 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'

FACET dimension_productCapability
SINCE 1 week ago

widgets.title: Live Archive Query Efficiency (executions)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage
SELECT count(*) AS 'Executions'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU'
 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL
SINCE 1 week ago 
FACET CASES (
 WHERE usage > 1 as 'Inefficient (>1 aCCU per Execution)', 
 WHERE usage <= 1 as 'Efficient (<=1 aCCU per Execution)'
)
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Live Archive Query Efficiency (CCUs)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage
SELECT sum(usage) AS 'Total CCU'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU'
 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL
SINCE 1 week ago 
FACET CASES (
 WHERE usage > 1 as 'Inefficient (>1 aCCU per Execution)', 
 WHERE usage <= 1 as 'Efficient (<=1 aCCU per Execution)'
)
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Live Archive Average Query Time Window (days)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage
SELECT average((dimension_untilTime - dimension_sinceTime) / (1000 * 3600 * 24)) as 'Time Window (days)'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU'
 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL
SINCE 1 week ago 
FACET CASES (
 WHERE usage > 1 as 'Inefficient (>1 CCU per Execution)', 
 WHERE usage <= 1 as 'Efficient (<=1 CCU per Execution)'
)
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Live Archives Query Analysis (1 week)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrComputeUsage 
SELECT sum(usage) AS 'CCUs', 
 count(*), 
 sum(usage)/count(*) as 'CCU/count', 
 average((dimension_untilTime - dimension_sinceTime) / (1000 * 3600 * 24)) as 'Time Window (days)'
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU' 
 AND dimension_dataCategory = 'LiveArchive'
 AND dimension_query IS NOT NULL
FACET dimension_query as 'Query', dimension_email as 'User Email', dimension_productCapability as 'Capability'
SINCE 1 week ago 
LIMIT MAX

widgets.title: Advanced CCU Usage Over Time (3 months)

nrqlQueries.query:
FROM NrConsumption 
SELECT sum(consumption) AS 'CCUs' 
WHERE metric = 'AdvancedCCU'
 AND (timestamp <= 1760950800000 OR timestamp >= 1760958000000)
 AND dimension_email IN ({{ userEmail}})
FACET monthOf(timestamp)
SINCE 3 months ago

nrqlQuery.query: FROM NrComputeUsage SELECT uniques(dimension_email) SINCE 6 months ago
